evals.prompt: List all my automations — hooks, skills, plugins, agents, MCP servers. Show me everything I have installed across global and project scope.
evals.expected_output: A .CLAUDE.automatons.md file with Global Scope (hooks, skills, plugins, plugin-bundled content, blocked plugins, settings) and Project Scope (hooks, MCP servers, skills, agents) sections, plus .CLAUDE.automatons.json and .CLAUDE.automatons.hash files. All items tagged as installed or custom.

evals.prompt: What Claude Code skills and plugins do I have? Generate an inventory of my setup.
evals.expected_output: A .CLAUDE.automatons.md file showing Global Scope with all plugins and skills, but Project Scope should show 'No project-level automations configured' or minimal content since this project has no .claude/ directory with skills/agents.

evals.prompt: I just installed some new plugins, update my automation inventory so it reflects the latest changes.
evals.expected_output: A regenerated .CLAUDE.automatons.md with a Recent Changes section showing additions/removals detected by comparing against the previous .CLAUDE.automatons.json. Updated .hash file.
